response: Priced at $999, the iPhone 15 Pro features a 6.1-inch OLED display, runs on the A17 Pro chip, and is available in 128GB, 256GB, 512GB, or 1TB storage configurations. Weighing just 187g, it pairs a 48MP main camera with a 3274mAh battery, earning an impressive customer rating of 4.6 out of 5.
